display_information.name: GoSignal
display_information.description: Evidence-backed launch readiness agent for Slack.
display_information.long_description: GoSignal turns public Slack launch and release threads into evidence-backed go or no-go decisions. It builds a durable markdown launch brief, highlights blockers and missing sign-offs, and gives teams one clear next action without relying on hidden AI judgment.

agent_view.agent_description: Analyze launch readiness in Slack, ground every decision in evidence, and drive one clear next action.

suggested_prompts.title: Analyze this launch
suggested_prompts.message: Analyze launch readiness for the current thread.

suggested_prompts.title: What is blocking us?
suggested_prompts.message: What is still blocking this launch?

suggested_prompts.title: Request the missing sign-off
suggested_prompts.message: Find the missing sign-off and suggest the next step.

shortcuts.name: Analyze launch readiness
shortcuts.description: Turn a launch thread into an evidence-backed readiness report
